notifications.bodySnapshot:
Hi GrabQuik Inc. / SLYDE Deliveries,

Thanks for applying to become a Slyder. We have received your application for Kingston and assigned reference SLY-2026-2C170AD9.

SLYDE is launching region by region across Jamaica. Your application will be reviewed alongside document completeness, area readiness, and operational requirements.

What happens next:

- You will receive WhatsApp and email confirmation that your submission is in review.

- The SLYDE team may contact you if we need more information or documents.

- If approved, you will receive activation guidance for the SLYDE app and setup steps.

Support: info@slyde.app | 876-594-7320

notificationTemplates.name: Slyder application received WhatsApp
notificationTemplates.bodyTemplate:
Hi {{firstName}}, SLYDE has received your application ({{applicationCode}}).

We are building the network region by region across Jamaica, and your application is now in structured review for {{zoneName}}.

You will receive updates by WhatsApp and email if we need more information or when your application moves forward.

Support: {{supportContact}}
notificationTemplates.description: Sent when a new Slyder application is received.

notificationTemplates.name: Slyder application received email
notificationTemplates.subject: SLYDE application received: {{applicationCode}}
notificationTemplates.bodyTemplate:
Hi {{fullName}},

Thanks for applying to become a Slyder. We have received your application for {{zoneName}} and assigned reference {{applicationCode}}.

SLYDE is launching region by region across Jamaica. Your application will be reviewed alongside document completeness, area readiness, and operational requirements.

What happens next:

- You will receive WhatsApp and email confirmation that your submission is in review.

- The SLYDE team may contact you if we need more information or documents.

- If approved, you will receive activation guidance for the SLYDE app and setup steps.

Support: {{supportEmail}} | {{supportPhone}}
notificationTemplates.description: Email confirmation after public Slyder application submission.

notificationTemplates.name: Slyder documents requested WhatsApp
Slyder documents requested email
notificationTemplates.subject: Additional documents needed for your SLYDE application

notificationTemplates.name: Slyder approved WhatsApp
Slyder approved email
notificationTemplates.subject: Your SLYDE application has been approved
notificationTemplates.bodyTemplate:
Hi {{fullName}},

Your SLYDE application ({{applicationCode}}) has been approved.

We are now preparing your Slyder account and activation flow. You will need to complete setup, readiness requirements, and any remaining onboarding tasks before going online.

This does not mean your area is live yet. It means you are positioned early as {{zoneName}} approaches launch readiness.

notificationTemplates.name: Slyder rejected email
notificationTemplates.subject: Update on your SLYDE application
notificationTemplates.bodyTemplate:
Hi {{fullName}},

We reviewed your SLYDE application ({{applicationCode}}), but we are unable to move forward at this time.

Reason: {{reviewReason}}

If the SLYDE team invites a future resubmission or requests updated information, we will contact you directly.

notificationTemplates.name: Slyder activation ready WhatsApp
Slyder activation ready email
notificationTemplates.subject: Activate your SLYDE account

notificationTemplates.name: Slyder login OTP SMS
notificationTemplates.bodyTemplate:
Your SLYDE login code is {{otpCode}}.

This code will expire shortly. Do not share it with anyone.

notificationTemplates.name: Slyder zone live WhatsApp
notificationTemplates.bodyTemplate:
{{zoneName}} is now live on SLYDE.

If your setup is complete and you are eligible, you can begin receiving delivery opportunities through the SLYDE network.

If you are not yet ready, complete your setup now.

notificationTemplates.name: Slyder zone live email
notificationTemplates.subject: {{zoneName}} is now live on SLYDE
notificationTemplates.bodyTemplate:
Hi {{fullName}},

{{zoneName}} is now live on the SLYDE network.

Eligible Slyders in your zone can now begin receiving delivery opportunities. If you still have setup steps pending, complete them as soon as possible to become operationally ready.

notificationTemplates.name: Merchant interest received email
notificationTemplates.subject: SLYDE received your business inquiry
notificationTemplates.bodyTemplate:
Hi {{contactName}},

Thanks for your interest in SLYDE. We have received your business inquiry for {{zoneName}}.

SLYDE is onboarding merchants region by region based on launch readiness, courier coverage, and operational fit.

A member of the SLYDE team may contact you regarding onboarding, waitlist status, and service availability in your area.

notificationTemplates.name: Merchant interest received WhatsApp
notificationTemplates.bodyTemplate:
SLYDE has received your business inquiry for {{businessName}} in {{zoneName}}.

We are onboarding merchants region by region and will contact you as your area approaches service readiness.

notificationTemplates.name: Merchant waitlist confirmation email
notificationTemplates.subject: {{businessName}} has been added to the SLYDE waitlist
notificationTemplates.bodyTemplate:
Hi {{contactName}},

{{businessName}} is now on the SLYDE merchant waitlist for {{zoneName}}.

This does not guarantee immediate activation. We use courier readiness and launch control to determine when a zone is ready for merchant onboarding.

notificationTemplates.name: Merchant prelaunch ready email
notificationTemplates.subject: {{zoneName}} is nearing merchant onboarding readiness
notificationTemplates.bodyTemplate:
Hi {{contactName}},

{{zoneName}} is nearing launch readiness on SLYDE.

Your business is well positioned for the next stage of merchant onboarding. The SLYDE team may reach out for follow-up information before activation.

notificationTemplates.name: Merchant zone live email
notificationTemplates.subject: {{zoneName}} is now live on SLYDE
notificationTemplates.bodyTemplate:
Hi {{contactName}},

{{zoneName}} is now live on the SLYDE network.

If your business is approved and operationally ready, the SLYDE team will guide you through the next onboarding step.

notificationTemplates.name: Merchant onboarding invite email
notificationTemplates.subject: You are invited to begin merchant onboarding with SLYDE
notificationTemplates.bodyTemplate:
Hi {{contactName}},

SLYDE is ready to begin the next onboarding step for {{businessName}}.

We will guide you through the required onboarding, legal, and operational setup needed before activation.

notificationTemplates.name: Admin zone near ready alert
Admin zone ready alert
Admin notification failure alert
Slyder login OTP email
notificationTemplates.subject: Your SLYDE login code
notificationTemplates.bodyTemplate:
Hi {{fullName}},

Your SLYDE one-time login code is {{otpCode}}.

This code will expire shortly. Do not share it with anyone.

notificationTemplates.name: Slyder documents review complete WhatsApp
Slyder documents review complete email
notificationTemplates.subject: Your SLYDE document review is complete

notificationTemplates.name: Slyder status update WhatsApp
Slyder status update email
notificationTemplates.subject: Your latest SLYDE onboarding update

notificationTemplates.name: Slyder activation completed email
notificationTemplates.subject: Your SLYDE activation is complete
notificationTemplates.bodyTemplate:
Hi {{fullName}},

Your SLYDE account activation is now complete.

You can now sign in with the same approved email or phone number and the password you just created.

Next steps:

1. Sign in to your Slyder account: {{loginUrl}}

2. Complete your remaining onboarding steps: {{onboardingUrl}}

3. Watch for updates from SLYDE about document review, onboarding readiness, and zone launch for {{zoneName}}.

legalDocuments.title: Merchant Privacy Notice
legalDocuments.contentMarkdown:
SLYDE collects business and contact information from merchants that submit interest, join the waitlist, or move into onboarding. This can include business name, contact person details, email address, phone number, WhatsApp number, service area information, business address, operational notes, and any additional onboarding details you provide.

We collect this information so we can evaluate service fit, assess launch readiness by parish and zone, communicate about onboarding, review whether your area is close to activation, and prepare future merchant operations on the SLYDE platform.

SLYDE may use merchant information to contact your team by email, phone, or WhatsApp about onboarding progress, requested details, launch timing, service availability, support issues, and future platform setup.

Merchant information may be stored in secure operational systems used by SLYDE to manage onboarding, waitlist review, launch control, account setup, and service activation. Access is limited to team members, approved operators, and service providers that need the information to support platform operations, communications, hosting, storage, or compliance.

Where necessary, SLYDE may share merchant information with technology vendors, communication providers, payment or onboarding service providers, or legal and regulatory authorities where disclosure is required for compliance, security, fraud prevention, or lawful process.

SLYDE keeps merchant information for as long as it is reasonably needed to manage business inquiries, onboarding records, operational setup, legal obligations, dispute resolution, internal review, and platform security. Retention periods may vary depending on whether your business stays on the waitlist, becomes active, or stops onboarding.

Submitting a merchant inquiry or continuing through onboarding does not mean SLYDE will immediately activate your business in your area. Service launch depends on courier network strength, operational readiness, launch control decisions, and other platform requirements.

If you have privacy questions or want to contact SLYDE about merchant data handling, you may reach us at info@slyde.app or by phone at 8765947320.
legalDocuments.summary: How SLYDE collects, uses, stores, and protects merchant and business-contact information during the waitlist, onboarding, and launch process.
legalDocuments.excerpt: This notice explains how SLYDE handles merchant and business-contact data during staged launch and onboarding.

legalDocuments.title: Merchant Interest and Onboarding Terms
legalDocuments.contentMarkdown:
Submitting a merchant inquiry to SLYDE means you are asking to be considered for onboarding, waitlist placement, launch planning, or future service activation. It does not create an immediate service agreement and does not guarantee approval, activation, or live delivery coverage.

SLYDE launches region by region. Merchant activation depends on zone readiness, courier network strength, operational support, launch control decisions, and any other internal requirements SLYDE uses to protect service quality and launch reliability.

A merchant may be prelaunch-ready, waitlisted, invited to onboarding, or delayed until a zone becomes operationally viable. SLYDE may delay, pause, or decline merchant activation where coverage, readiness, compliance, or operational support is not sufficient.

You agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information during the inquiry and onboarding process. SLYDE may request additional information, documents, operational details, or commercial information before onboarding continues.

SLYDE may contact you electronically, including by email, WhatsApp, or phone, regarding onboarding progress, launch readiness, requested documents or details, service availability, and other merchant communications related to platform activation.

Merchant onboarding may occur in stages. SLYDE may first collect waitlist information, later invite a business into onboarding, and then require additional legal, commercial, or platform terms before activation. Further terms may include platform terms, payment terms, operational terms, or other commercial agreements.

SLYDE does not guarantee immediate access to live deliveries before a zone is launched. Even after a business is reviewed or approved in principle, activation may remain pending until the area is launch-ready and operational controls are in place.

SLYDE may update these terms from time to time. Where updated versions are required for continued onboarding or activation, merchants may be asked to review and accept the latest version before progressing.
legalDocuments.summary: The launch-stage terms that apply when a merchant submits interest, joins the waitlist, or begins onboarding with SLYDE.
legalDocuments.excerpt: These terms explain the region-by-region launch model and that inquiry submission does not guarantee immediate activation.

legalDocuments.title: Slyder Applicant Privacy Notice
legalDocuments.contentMarkdown:
SLYDE collects personal, contact, document, vehicle, readiness, and onboarding information from Slyder applicants so we can review applications, verify identity, assess zone fit, and determine whether an applicant can move into approval, activation, setup, and readiness.

This information may include your name, date of birth, contact details, address, TRN, emergency contact information, courier type, vehicle information, document uploads, availability, preferred zones, device details, and onboarding or readiness responses.

SLYDE uses this information to manage applicant review, document verification, readiness checks, activation planning, compliance workflows, fraud prevention, support, and future courier operations within the platform.

Applicant information may be stored in secure systems used for onboarding, support, communications, audit logging, and operational controls. Access is limited to SLYDE team members, approved operators, and technology or communication providers who need the information to support the onboarding lifecycle.

SLYDE may share applicant information with service providers that support storage, communication, verification, hosting, security, or compliance. Information may also be disclosed where required by law, lawful request, fraud prevention, or safety response.

Applying to SLYDE may involve communications by email, WhatsApp, phone, SMS, or in-app messaging later in the lifecycle. These communications may include application confirmations, document requests, approval notices, activation instructions, readiness reminders, or support responses.

Applicant information is retained for as long as reasonably needed for onboarding review, compliance, auditability, dispute resolution, security, and future operational recordkeeping.

Questions about applicant privacy may be directed to info@slyde.app or 8765947320.
legalDocuments.summary: How SLYDE collects, reviews, stores, and protects Slyder applicant data during application, verification, and onboarding.
legalDocuments.excerpt: This notice explains how SLYDE handles applicant identity, document, contact, and readiness data.

legalDocuments.title: Slyder Application and Onboarding Terms
legalDocuments.contentMarkdown:
Submitting a SLYDE application starts a structured review process. It does not guarantee approval, activation, immediate access to the SLYDE app, immediate work opportunities, or launch in your area.

SLYDE launches region by region. Your ability to begin working depends on application approval, document verification, account creation, setup completion, readiness requirements, and your zone reaching launch readiness.

SLYDE may request additional information or documents, pause review, or decline an application where information is incomplete, requirements are not met, or operational fit is not sufficient.

If approved, SLYDE may create a courier account, issue activation instructions, and require you to complete additional setup or onboarding requirements before you become eligible for delivery work.

SLYDE may update onboarding requirements, activation steps, or future courier terms as the logistics network grows. Additional courier or independent contractor terms may be required before certain operational access is granted.

Applicants must provide accurate information and keep contact details current so SLYDE can communicate about onboarding, approvals, launch timing, and readiness status.
legalDocuments.summary: Launch-stage application and onboarding terms for future Slyders joining the SLYDE network.
legalDocuments.excerpt: These terms explain that applying does not guarantee approval, activation, or immediate work.

legalDocuments.title: Website Privacy Policy
legalDocuments.contentMarkdown:
SLYDE collects personal, business, and inquiry information submitted through this website to review applications, respond to contact requests, evaluate partnerships, and support future logistics operations.

Slyder application data can include identification details, contact information, courier type, vehicle details, document metadata, availability, and readiness information. This data is used to assess whether an applicant can move into review, approval, account activation, and later work eligibility.

Business and API inquiry data is used to evaluate service fit, partnership opportunity, and future integration planning. Information may be retained for operational follow-up, legal compliance, internal review, and platform onboarding.

As backend services are connected, SLYDE may use secure storage, access controls, verification tools, and audit workflows to protect submitted information and manage the approval-to-login lifecycle responsibly.
legalDocuments.summary: How SLYDE handles information submitted through the public website.
legalDocuments.excerpt: This policy explains how SLYDE handles public website application, inquiry, and contact data.

legalDocuments.title: Website Terms of Use
legalDocuments.contentMarkdown:
By using the SLYDE public website, you agree to provide accurate information in any application, inquiry, or contact submission. Submission of a form does not guarantee approval, activation, partnership, or access to any platform feature.

Slyder applicants understand that website submission begins a review process only. Work eligibility depends on review, document verification, approval, account creation, activation, setup completion, readiness checks, and any further operational requirements set by SLYDE.

Businesses and partners understand that service availability, coverage, pricing, and integration scope may vary by geography, demand profile, operational readiness, and contractual agreement.

SLYDE may update website content, service positioning, workflows, and legal terms as the logistics network evolves. Continued use of the website indicates acceptance of the current terms.
legalDocuments.summary: Terms that apply to use of the SLYDE public website.
legalDocuments.excerpt: These terms explain how applications, inquiries, and public-site use are handled by SLYDE.

legalDocuments.title: SLYDE Final Courier Terms
legalDocuments.contentMarkdown:
These Final Courier Terms apply after SLYDE approves an applicant and offers activation access to a Slyder account. Approval alone does not make a person operationally eligible to perform deliveries.

An approved Slyder must complete activation, accept the current required legal documents, complete setup, complete readiness requirements, and satisfy any operational verification steps before SLYDE may allow the account to go online.

SLYDE may require confirmation of profile details, contact details, emergency contact details, vehicle details, equipment readiness, training acknowledgment, permissions awareness, payout setup, and any other reasonable onboarding steps needed to support safe and reliable operations.

A Slyder may be fully onboarded but still unable to receive work if the assigned area or coverage zone is not yet live, is paused, or is otherwise unavailable for operations. SLYDE controls launch timing zone by zone.

SLYDE may suspend, delay, restrict, or block operational access where readiness requirements are not met, documents are incomplete or invalid, account controls are triggered, or operational conditions require additional review.

Operational access to the SLYDE network does not guarantee any minimum amount of work, earnings, launch timing, or courier volume. Access depends on service demand, launch status, operational controls, and platform requirements.

By accepting these terms, you agree to use the SLYDE platform responsibly, follow delivery and customer-service expectations, maintain accurate account information, and comply with all additional platform instructions that apply to courier operations.
legalDocuments.summary: Final post-approval terms that govern Slyder account activation, setup, readiness, and operational eligibility.
legalDocuments.excerpt: These terms apply after approval and before a Slyder can become eligible to go online.

employeeAnnouncements.title: Morning dispatch desk protocol
employeeAnnouncements.excerpt: Supervisors want all logistics employees on the dispatch floor fifteen minutes before handoff windows begin.
employeeAnnouncements.body: Starting this week, logistics employees should check the dispatch board, confirm open zone readiness, and review exception notes before the first handoff period. Report unresolved merchant or rider blockers directly to your supervisor before the window opens.

employeeAnnouncements.title: Payroll visibility rollout
employeeAnnouncements.excerpt: Employees can now review paycheck totals and payout history directly inside the portal.
employeeAnnouncements.body: The first release of the employee portal includes pay summary cards and payout history for approved staff accounts. Report any discrepancies to payroll before the scheduled pay date so corrections can be reviewed in the same cycle.

employeeGuides.title: SLYDE employee handbook
employeeGuides.summary: Company-wide standards, operational expectations, and handbook guidance for active employees.
employeeGuides.contentMarkdown: See the employee handbook viewer for the current handbook source.

employeeGuides.title: Logistics floor playbook
employeeGuides.summary: Dispatch routines, escalation timing, and practical logistics desk expectations.
employeeGuides.contentMarkdown:
1. Review launch, readiness, and exception queues before shift start.
2. Confirm dispatch blockers with supervisors early.
3. Log unresolved issues for the next handoff window.
4. Escalate high-risk merchant failures immediately.
